intro: Acidosasa longiligula, also known as Long Ligule Bamboo, is a species of bamboo that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, Acidosasa longiligula is used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of Acidosasa longiligula include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, Acidosasa longiligula is commonly used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in the preparation of topical ointments and salves.
